name: NABORS INDUSTRIES LTD
summary: PARTI Nabors Industries, Ltd. (NYSE: NBR) was formed as a Bermuda exempted company on December11, 2001. Unless the context requires otherwise, references in this annual report to we, us, our, the Company, or Nabors mean Nabors IndustriesLtd., together with our subsidiaries. References in this annual report to Nabors Delaware mean Nabors Industries, Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Nabors.
